title: Fix dashboard views in the mobile app

posts.author: eduardo_worktables (Eduardo Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com team!

I’ve been using the monday.com mobile app for a while now and I like it overall, but one small problem bugs me very much. Which is the docked dashboard views.

When I open a dashboard that has a docked widget in it, the widget only fills 80% of the screen’s height and adds a bottom margin for no reason. When you change the phone’s orientation to horizontal, it gets even worse, the app only shows a very small part of the actual widget, the rest is only unnecessary margins.

This problem only happens in the Android version (I tested in the iOS and it works just fine). Also there are other things that work differently between the two platforms, like redirecting for an external link when using a custom app as a dashboard widget.

I believe this is an easy fix, since the iOS version works fine, it only needs to be updated in the Android version. I know this is very specific, but I believe that would make the UX much better.

Important note: The dashboard widget in which I’m testing this, is actually an custom app that has a dashboard widget feature.
